valid.name: no-cascade

invalid.name: cascade

errors.message: Avoid `ON DELETE CASCADE`. The deletion will silently propagate through every dependent row; prefer an explicit `RESTRICT` or `SET NULL` action and handle the cleanup in application code.
Avoid `ON DELETE CASCADE`. The deletion will silently propagate through every dependent row; prefer an explicit `RESTRICT` or `SET NULL` action and handle the cleanup in application code.
